title: Savory Moroccan Lettuce Stir-fry
description: A gluten-free-friendly savory dish featuring baby lettuce leaves, infused with the rich flavors of Morocco through sous-vide cooking for a hangover-cure delicacy.

ingredients.name: oregano leaves
ingredients.notes: fresh for a touch of freshness

instructions: Preheat your sous-vide machine to 150°F (65°C) for baby lettuce leaves. Place the leaves in a single layer on a plastic sheet and vacuum seal them in a bag.
Sous-vide the bagged leaves for 3 hours at 150°F (65°C). Check temperature regularly to maintain it within range.

While the sous-vived leaves are cooling, roughly mince the garlic cloves. Toast cumin and coriander seeds lightly in a dry skillet until fragrant, then grind them with a mortar and pestle or using a spice grinder.
To assemble, heat olive oil in a frying pan over medium heat. Add minced garlic, sauté for about 30 seconds to release its flavors, then add the toasted cumin and coriander seeds mixture.
Add the cooled sous-vided leaves to the pan, tossing well to coat them evenly with the spice paste. Mix in paprika powder, oregano, and a pinch of saffron if using for added color and flavor.
Toss gently until all the leaves are coated and heated through, about 2-3 minutes on medium heat.
Serve warm or at room temperature as a snack to aid hangover recovery.
